description: Drag CKC image into note: a CKC media asset (created via the managed POST /workspaces/{id}/loom/import asset-create path) is embedded as an hsLink node (refKind=HS_images) in a saved note; reload returns the node with the asset id. Routes verified 2026-06-26: there is NO bare POST /assets route; knowledge docs are merged bare (no /workspaces prefix) and save uses the /save suffix; create returns document.rich_document_id.

Drag CKC video into note: same as IC-01 with mime=video/mp4 (asset via POST /workspaces/{id}/loom/import); saved doc carries an hsLink node refKind=video. Routes corrected 2026-06-26 (no bare POST /assets; bare knowledge docs; /save suffix; document.rich_document_id).

blocker: ckc_moodboard_content_type_absent_in_LoomBlockContentType_enum: backend has no ckc_moodboard variant; scenario uses note fallback and is PARTIAL until the backend adds the CKC content types (typed blocker, no backend edit in this MT)
description: Drag CKC moodboard card onto canvas: a ckc_moodboard Loom block is placed on a canvas board; GET board returns the placement. CTRL-8: ckc_moodboard is NOT in the backend LoomBlockContentType enum (verified 2026-06-26: only note/file/annotated_file/tag_hub/journal/canvas/view_def) -> typed blocker + note fallback, scenario PARTIAL.

blocker: ckc_character_content_type_absent_in_LoomBlockContentType_enum: backend has no ckc_character variant; scenario uses note fallback and is PARTIAL (typed blocker, no backend edit in this MT)
description: CKC character referenced in note: a [[loom_block:character_block_id]] wikilink in a saved note registers a backlink; GET backlinks contains the note's block id. CTRL-8: ckc_character is NOT in the backend LoomBlockContentType enum -> typed blocker + note fallback, PARTIAL.

Route note selection to Stage pane: a text-range selection is routed via the SAME shared InteractionBus route-to-stage command into one StagePane; the Stage AccessKit surface label/value matches the selected text. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG). Contract names author_id 'stage.selection.preview'; the REAL registered id is 'stage-routed-content' (MT-033/066) -> assert the real id, typed note on the discrepancy (not a stale-label assert).

Open code block from note: clicking a [[code:symbol]] hsLink chip dispatches open-code-symbol on the SAME shared bus, staging the symbol entity id for the code pane to jump to. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG): the note->code dispatch + bus staging is proven; the code-pane jump-to-line lands when the code pane mounts (E11/MT-069 ShellNavigator seam).

Reference code symbol from note: 'Copy as note reference' on a code symbol writes a [[code:...]] string to a mockable clipboard; pasting/inserting it into a note yields an hsLink node kind=code that round-trips content_json. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG): clipboard write + content_json round-trip.

Shared find/replace across code and note: ONE shared InteractionBus dispatches a FindQuery command; BOTH a code surface and a rich-text note surface registered on the SAME bus return hits for a query present in both. The bus dispatch count increments (proves the SAME instance routed, not two independent backends). SUBSTRATE proof (no PG).

Code diagnostics surface note reference: a code diagnostic carrying a related-note reference dispatches open-document on the SAME shared bus; the rich-editor pane's real AccessKit surface ('rich-editor-surface') is the focus target. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG). Contract names 'rich_editor.pane.{doc_id}'; the REAL registered id is 'rich-editor-surface' -> assert the real id, typed note.

Backlink appears across surfaces: saving note A (with a wikilink to code-block B) registers a Loom backlink edge B<-A in PG. CTRL-2: the save-calls-backlink contract is verified at the call-site level (the native save dispatches the backlink upsert via the real PUT /knowledge/documents/{doc_id}/save route); the full PG round-trip is requires_pg. Save route corrected 2026-06-26 (/save suffix; document.rich_document_id).

Loom Search v2 surfaces results from both editors: a note + a code-file block both containing XSEARCH_PROBE both appear in POST /loom/search-v2 hits; facets contain both content types. CTRL-6: poll the search endpoint up to 5x200ms (1s budget) before asserting (async indexing).

Graph view shows cross-surface edges: GET /workspaces/{id}/loom/graph/local?start_block_id=loom_A&max_depth=2 returns both loom_A and loom_B as nodes with a connecting edge; the native force-directed layout places both at distinct positions without panic. Route corrected 2026-06-26: there is NO bare /loom/graph; the real block-neighborhood route is /loom/graph/local (start_block_id+max_depth) returning {nodes,edges}.

AI Loom job proposes cross-surface link: a link_suggest AI job proposes a code-file target; accepting it writes a real backlink edge. Requires a real AI model endpoint. SKIP_AI_TESTS gate: status=SKIPPED (CTRL-5, explicit console), NEVER silently skipped, NEVER faked PASS.

Quick-switcher surfaces items from both editors: the quick-switcher's q-driven cross-surface query is served by GET /workspaces/{id}/loom/search?q=XSEARCH_PROBE (route corrected 2026-06-26: /loom/quick-switcher is recents-only with a limit param and NO q; the real q-route backing the quick-switcher is /loom/search). Returns entries from both the note (knowledge_rich_document) and the code block (code_file); each hit's block carries block_id, title, content_type, updated_at.

Undo crosses rich editor edit: a rich-text edit (insert EDIT_A) is pushed onto the ONE shared undo stack; one undo reverts it so the content no longer contains EDIT_A. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG): the SAME Arc<Mutex<InteractionBus>> undo scope reverts the rich edit. The backend version-revert half is requires_pg (bare GET /knowledge/documents/{doc_id}, no /workspaces prefix).

Undo crosses code editor edit: a code-buffer edit (insert CODE_EDIT) recorded on the ONE shared undo stack is reverted by one undo so the buffer no longer contains CODE_EDIT. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG) via the real CodeEditorPanel + push_code_edit_undo adapter. The PG version-revert half is requires_pg.

Event-ledger records cross-surface actions: a sequence of note saves + a wikilink insert produces >=2 KNOWLEDGE_RICH_DOCUMENT_SAVED events in the ledger in order, and the second event's payload carries the wikilink block reference. CTRL-7: the GET /events (Flight Recorder list_events) endpoint EXISTS (verified 2026-06-26 in src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/flight_recorder.rs:74 BARE route /events + /flight_recorder) -> requires_pg, NOT BLOCKED. Routes corrected 2026-06-26: events is BARE /events filtered by the wsid query param (no /workspaces prefix, bare Vec<FlightEvent>); knowledge saves use the bare /knowledge/documents/{doc_id}/save route.

Shared undo stack policy scoped per-pane vs global: two panes (rich note A, code file B) are edited in sequence, then ONE undo reverts only the MOST RECENTLY edited surface (B), leaving A unchanged. CTRL-4: a single Arc<Mutex<UndoStack>> shared by both editors; the test inspects BOTH surfaces after one undo. SUBSTRATE proof (no PG), the load-bearing per-pane-scope policy proof.
